title: How TeamPCP turned Aqua Security's own Trivy scanner into a weapon against millions of developers
author: Steven J. Vaughan-Nichols
zh_title: TeamPCP反噬Aqua Security：Trivy扫描器化身百万开发者“凶器”
zh_summary: TeamPCP利用Aqua Security的Trivy扫描器发动大规模供应链攻击，窃取凭据，危害众多开源项目和开发者，暴露了GitHub Actions的漏洞。提醒需轮换凭据、锁定GitHub Actions以增强安全性。
